entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for iron deficiency chlorosis and productivity traits

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: An abiotic constraint that reduces growth and yield in groundnut

entities.name: CALCAREOUS SOILS
entities.description: Soil type that often leads to iron deficiency in plants

entities.name: FOLIAR APPLICATION OF FE-CHELATES
entities.description: A treatment used to overcome iron deficiency

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of lines used for genetic analysis of traits

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A condition characterized by yellowing of leaves due to iron deficiency

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the overall yield and productivity of the crop

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Environmental condition used to evaluate IDC and productivity

entities.name: GENOTYPIC X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genotype and the environment affecting trait expression

entities.name: VISUAL CHLOROTIC RATING
entities.description: A phenotypic measurement used to assess iron deficiency chlorosis

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: A measurement of chlorophyll content used to assess iron deficiency chlorosis

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: A specific productivity trait measured as grams per plant

entities.name: SHELLING PER CENT
entities.description: A productivity trait measuring the percentage of seed weight to pod weight

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A productivity trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: IDC TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under iron deficient conditions

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas of the genome associated with a particular trait
